---
title: "Writing-up"
bibliography: references.bib
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
params: 
    SHOW_SOLS: TRUE
    TOGGLE: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source('assets/setup.R')
```

:::red
**PRE-LAB ACTIVITIES**

Before attempting the lab please read ?.
:::

:::lo
**LEARNING OBJECTIVES**


:::
